---
title: "Project_2_Data_624"
author: "Mubashira Qari"
date: "2026-04-18"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
  word_document:
    toc: true
---

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

library(tidyverse)
library(fpp3)
library(naniar) # Excellent for visualizing missingness

#  Read the raw data

url <- "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/uzmabb182/Data_624_Predictive_Analytics/refs/heads/main/StudentData.csv"
std_eval_df <- read_csv(url_1)

url_1 <- "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/uzmabb182/Data_624_Predictive_Analytics/refs/heads/main/StudentEvaluation.csv"
std_df <- read_csv(url)

#view(std_df)
view(std_eval_df)
```
